justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified with all three sources named (Product/BR-1, Finance/BR-2, Operations/BR-3); formal escalation produced in the escalations array before any acceptance criteria; acceptance_criteria array is empty; no invented reconciliation presented as fact — options are clearly labeled as options with a recommendation to meet with stakeholders first; response clearly states what information is needed to proceed.

observations.text: Contradiction is precisely articulated: invoiced-at-placement + invoice-irreversibility = no cancellation ever, contradicting PM's cancel-before-shipment rule.
All three conflicting sources explicitly named and traced to specific business rules (BR-1, BR-2, BR-3).
Acceptance criteria array is deliberately empty — no criteria produced for the contradicted feature.
Confidence level set at 25, well below the 70 threshold, with clear reasoning about why.
Options A-D are presented as stakeholder choices, not as invented reconciliations passed off as the spec.
Rejection reasons section explicitly states the requirements cannot be implemented as given.
Edge cases correctly marked as UNDEFINED rather than resolved with invented logic.
Business impact analysis identifies real downstream consequences including legal/regulatory risk.
